name: Escalating Runeblades
description:
Craft a series of Apocryphal runes before launching them at a foe, dealing 696 Magic Damage, 766 Magic Damage, and 917 Magic Damage and generating Crux. The last rune explodes, dealing damage to all enemies within 8 meters of the target.

This ability deals 3% increased damage for each active Crux when cast.
